category_sources: source_facts.description says serial flasher utility for Espressif SoCs and modules; official README describes serial flasher utilities for Espressif devices.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is espflash; official GitHub repository and README use espflash.
docs_sources: Official repository README points to the espflash package README for information and installation instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/esp-rs/espflash; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Espressif serial flashing; official README lists supported ESP32-family targets and describes espflash as a library and command-line tool.
